allow: Bash(hpcc "ls -la ~/agent_*.out ~/agent_*.err 2>/dev/null | tail -10; echo ''===LATEST OUT===''; ls -t ~/agent_*.out 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs cat 2>/dev/null | tail -60; echo ''===LATEST ERR===''; ls -t ~/agent_*.err 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs cat 2>/dev/null | tail -60")

Bash(# Check with more permissive settings \(user-agent, follow redirects\) for domain in oag.texas.gov tlo.texas.gov coa.courts.state.tx.us; do echo ""=== $domain ==="" curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""https: %{http_code} → %{redirect_url}\\n"" -L --max-time 15 -A ""Mozilla/5.0"" ""https://$domain"" curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""http: %{http_code} → %{redirect_url}\\n"" -L --max-time 15 -A ""Mozilla/5.0"" ""http://$domain"" # DNS check dig +short ""$domain"")
